narrative:
Westfield TWP township has 2,936 registered voters, with 51.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.3 percentage points.
